hero.subtitle: The best Italian restaurant in Poland!

about.title: Who are we?
about.p1: We are Italian brothers who decided to bring the secrets of our family kitchen into interiors full of modern elegance.
about.p2: We believe that true Italian hospitality is a combination of respect for tradition with a touch of contemporary chic. Here, every dish tells the story of our home, and carefully selected ingredients straight from Italy make authentic flavors taste best here. We invite you to the table where time flows slower.

f1.title: Authentic flavors
f1.desc: We import the best products straight from Italy. With us, you will eat just like in the heart of Naples, with no compromises on quality.

f2.title: Instant reservation
f2.desc: Don't wait in line. Book your favorite table for the evening in a few seconds thanks to our convenient online system.

f3.title: Family atmosphere
f3.desc: Italian hospitality is our showcase. At Qui la Carne, every guest is treated like a member of our family.

carousel.title: Our best dishes
carousel.subtitle: The dishes that keep our guests coming back every day.

pizza.name: Pizza Margherita Autentico
pizza.desc: Classic Neapolitan pizza with San Marzano tomatoes, fresh buffalo mozzarella, and basil.

steak.name: Bistecca alla Fiorentina
steak.desc: The queen of Italian steaks. A massive bone-in beef steak, grilled with sea salt and rosemary.

pasta.name: Pasta al Tartufo
pasta.desc: Handmade tagliatelle pasta enveloped in a velvety black truffle sauce and parmesan.
